schedule.title: Wedding Ceremony
schedule.details: Witness our heartfelt exchange of vows as we begin our forever together.

schedule.title: Photo Session
schedule.details: The newlyweds, together with their families and entourage, will capture cherished moments through commemorative photographs before the celebration continues.

schedule.title: Wedding Dinner
schedule.details: Join us for dinner, drinks, dancing, and a joyful celebration of our new beginning.

faq.question: Can I take photos?
faq.answer: YES! but no magic flash during spellcasting.

faq.question: Can I bring a plus-one in your wedding?
faq.answer: Unfortunately, No! Our guests are limited and hand picked on purpose. We kindly request to not bring uninvited guest or tag-along companies may they be an adult or kids.

faq.question: Will there be transportation provided to the venue?
faq.answer: Transportation to the venue will not be provided. However, there is ample parking available for those who prefer to drive.

faq.question: What if I still go even if I did not fill-out the RSVP?
faq.answer: Since your name is not listed, unfortunately there will be no seat & no food available for you.

faq.question: I replied "NO" on RSVP yet I changed my mind, can I go?
faq.answer: It depends on the available slots. If you say "NO", it means you slot will be given to another guest.

faq.question: Are children allowed at the wedding?
faq.answer: We love your little ones! However, we have decided to keep our wedding and reception an adults- only event with the exception of immediate family & those requested. We encourage you to use this day/afternoon/evening as a date!

faq.question: What should I wear to your wedding?
faq.answer: We'd love for everyone to dress in Formal or Semi-Formal attire. Our wedding color motif is Powder Blue, and we'd appreciate it if you could wear this shade. Ladies: Dress/Cocktail Dress. Gentlemen: Long Sleeve, Polo, or Coat.
